hintDisplay: Sujeto: yo / Verbo: cocinar (pasado irrealis) / Complemento: la cena más temprano / Tiempo: esa noche

correctSentence: If I had woken up earlier that night, I would not have cooked dinner so late.

correctSentence: If my brother had not played video games, he would have slept better at night.
